name: Fantasy Bot

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '*/5 * * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  run-bot:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          playwright install chromium
          playwright install-deps chromium

      - name: Run bot
        env:
          FB_FANTASY_PAGE_ID:       ${{ secrets.FB_FANTASY_PAGE_ID }}
          FB_FANTASY_ACCESS_TOKEN:  ${{ secrets.FB_FANTASY_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
          FB_NEWS_PAGE_ID:          ${{ secrets.FB_NEWS_PAGE_ID }}
          FB_NEWS_ACCESS_TOKEN:     ${{ secrets.FB_NEWS_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
          GEMINI_API_KEY:           ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
          GROQ_API_KEY:             ${{ secrets.GROQ_API_KEY }}
        run: python main.py
